title: Product
summary: 9609 AS — product features, branding, and product life cycle.
learningObjectives: Explain the product element of the marketing mix.
Analyse role of branding and packaging.
Evaluate product decisions for case firms.

simpleExplanation.title: What you sell
simpleExplanation.summary: Product covers goods and services, their features, quality, brand, and how they evolve from launch to decline.

sections.content: **Product** (3.3.2) is first of the **4Ps detail**. Use **PLC diagram** and **brand examples** in case answers.
